meta.title: Design System
meta.description: A scalable design system for enterprise inspection products — tokens, components, and patterns that bridge Figma and React.

hero.title: Design System
hero.desc: Design principles and a UI library for building one product experience. Foundation defines the visual primitives; Components catalogs the reusable patterns built on top.

foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.desc: The visual primitives every component is built on — color, typography, iconography, and object style tokens.

typography.desc: Type scale, weight, and line-height tokens for hierarchy and readability

color.desc: Brand, semantic, and UI-state color palettes

icon.desc: Guidelines for system iconography — size, layout, stroke, style

object-style.desc: Radius, elevation, and border tokens for surfaces

components.title: Components
components.desc: {count} UI building blocks — each documented with Anatomy, Variants, Spec, and Usage.

navigation.desc: Wayfinding and movement across the product

dataDisplay.desc: Components that structure and present data
